series_metadata.series_title: Daily Packet of Trade Sheets & Trade Report
series_metadata.series_description: This packet contains copies of the trade tickets that document the purchase and sale of securities by employees in the Investments department (including for the State Regular Account & STAR Ohio). The packet also contains a summary Trade Report that lists all securities that were bought, sold, or available for loan to others on the corresponding date.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and an additional 6 fiscal years
